items.q: The character Robert Angier appears in Whiplash.
items.explanation: Robert Angier appears in The Prestige, not Whiplash.

items.q: The character Sarah Connor appears in The Terminator.
items.explanation: Sarah Connor is a key character in The Terminator.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Clarice Starling.
items.explanation: Clarice Starling is strongly linked to The Silence of the Lambs.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Cooper.
items.explanation: Cooper is strongly linked to Interstellar.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Daniel Plainview.
items.explanation: Daniel Plainview is strongly linked to There Will Be Blood.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Andrew Neiman.
items.explanation: Andrew Neiman is strongly linked to Whiplash.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Truman Show?
items.explanation: Truman Burbank is one of the defining characters in The Truman Show.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Pianist?
items.explanation: Wladyslaw Szpilman is one of the defining characters in The Pianist.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Memento?
items.explanation: Leonard Shelby is one of the defining characters in Memento.

items.q: Which movie features the character Verbal Kint?
items.explanation: Verbal Kint is associated with The Usual Suspects.
